preReview.title: Minnesota United v Los Angeles FC: Cherundolo complacido de recuperar impulso
preReview.description: Los Angeles FC espera mantener su racha ganadora cuando se enfrente a los rivales de la Conferencia Oeste Minnesota United esta semana.

preReview.title: Minnesota United v Los Angeles FC: Cherundolo soddisfatto di aver recuperato il momento
preReview.description: Los Angeles FC spera di proseguire la sua serie di vittorie quando affronterà i rivali della Western Conference Minnesota United questa settimana.

preReview.title: Minnesota United x Los Angeles FC: Cherundolo satisfeito em recuperar o impulso
preReview.description: O Los Angeles FC espera manter sua sequência de vitórias quando enfrentar os rivais da Conferência Oeste, Minnesota United, nesta semana.

preReview.title: Minnesota United v Los Angeles FC: Cherundolo pleased to regain momentum
preReview.description: Los Angeles FC are hoping to keep their winning run going when they face Western Conference rivals Minnesota United this week.

preReview.title: Minnesota United contre Los Angeles FC : Cherundolo heureux de retrouver son élan
preReview.description: Los Angeles FC espère poursuivre sa série de victoires lorsqu'ils affronteront leurs rivaux de la Conférence Ouest, le Minnesota United, cette semaine.

preReview.title: Minnesota United gegen Los Angeles FC: Cherundolo erfreut, Schwung zurückzugewinnen
preReview.description: Los Angeles FC hofft, seine Siegesserie fortzusetzen, wenn es diese Woche gegen den Rivalen der Western Conference, Minnesota United, geht.
